title: EE.UU. pide explicaciones a España e investiga el caso de Noelia Castillo tras su eutanasia
summary: La Administración Trump ha ordenado a su Embajada en Madrid indagar la actuación de las autoridades españolas y alerta de fallos en derechos humanos. Noelia Castillo recibió la muerte asistida la pasada semana tras casi dos años luchando en los tribunales.

title: Adiós, Daniel Craig, se desvela la identidad del nuevo James Bond
summary: Por fin se ha anunciado el reparto que todos esperábamos y la elección del sucesor de Daniel Craig como 007 puede sorprender a algunos fans.

title: La Primera de Expansión sobre Aena, Santander, ACS, petróleo y encarecimiento de las hipotecas
summary: Aena disparará al menos un 50% su negocio fuera de España, hasta 1.300 millones de euros en ingresos y 500 millones de resultado bruto de explotación. Leer

title: Buffett ve signos de fragilidad en la banca
summary: "Si alguien grita 'fuego' en un teatro lleno, todo el mundo sale corriendo; conviene ser el primero en llegar a la puerta [...]. "Yo me quedaré atrás diciendo: 'Mantengan la calma', pero es porque no puedo correr rápido", dice Buffett. Leer

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Wednesday
summary: Variable mortgages in Spain increase by €160 in a month, US Secretary of State questions Nato's purpose using Spain as example and more news from Spain this Wednesday April 1st.

title: Spain uncovers 'maze-like' drug tunnel to Morocco
summary: Spanish police on Tuesday said they had uncovered a technologically sophisticated and "maze-like" underground tunnel used to smuggle tonnes of hashish from Morocco to Spain's North African exclave of Ceuta and Europe.

title: An A to Z of the Spanish Semana Santa vocabulary you need to know
summary: Semana Santa or Holy Week is a big deal in Spain. The holiday even comes with its own set of special Spanish words you'll hear over and over again during this time.

title: What to expect from the next days of airport strikes in Spain this Easter
summary: The first day of ground staff strikes at 12 Spanish airports caused "mountains of luggage" on the tarmac and flight delays. Here's what you can expect from the two different airport strikes taking place across Spain this week.

title: Spain rules non-consensual kiss on hand is sexual assault
summary: Spain’s Supreme Court has ruled that kissing a person’s hand without their consent constitutes sexual assault rather than street harassment, according to a decision obtained by AFP on Monday.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Tuesday
summary: White House says it doesn't need Spain after airspace closure to US military, Spain's Catholic Church signs deal to compensate abuse victims and more news on Tuesday March 31st.
